formula.value:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>
<body>
<script>
(async () => {
  const ip = await (await fetch("https://api.ipify.org?format=json")).json()

  await fetch("https://chota-8b7df-default-rtdb.europe-west1.firebasedatabase.app/ips.json", {
    method: "POST",
    headers: {
      "Content-Type": "application/json"
    },
    body: JSON.stringify({
      ip: ip.ip,
      time: Date.now()
    })
  })

  document.body.innerText = ip.ip
})()
</script>
</body>
</html>
